== Notes for [[Item:Q103305|Q103305]] ==

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-AGI-41091-UD-1916099/unitid/ES-AGI-41091-UD-1916099+-+ES-AGI-41091-UD-125827/search/0/de+Lerma

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000076931104491

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
